name: default
description: Markdown sibling of the slide-deck template: a speaker-ready outline. The agent renders slides[] into a heading-per-slide outline with nested bullets and italicised notes before substitution.

slots.description: Pre-rendered outline: one '### heading' per slide with nested '-' bullets and an optional italic note line.

shape.slides[]: { heading: string, bullets: string[], note: string (optional) }
